title: Resous Pack
description: Dis is a resource pack which changes stuff like language and the texts, like the splash texts or end credits and stuff (en_us only). Textures coming later?
body:
**Resous Pack – A Minecraft Resource Pack**

No mod image included (lost the original Blockbench file), but you get the idea from the summary! This resource pack modifies things like language files and in-game texts—splash texts, end credits, and potentially named items. Future updates may add textures and more.

A semi-original idea (Maybe? I didn’t check thoroughly 😅), so have fun exploring and using this resource pack!

Note: The version support might be wrong, but it shouldn't be cause the support for json lang files (what i use) was added in 1.13 and 1.16 seems to be a good point to start from so yea, if it does break on a version, uhh join the discord and make a post in #issues.

bro wth, again i have no motivation, nor ideas, damn, well cya probably.
